raw:
{
  "judge_id": "JUDGE-123",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.4": 3,
    "R1.7": 2,
    "RX.1": 4,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 4
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.4": "The agent identifies some prior work (e.g., ESMValTool, WeatherBench 2) but does not map against the nearest 3-5 works or identify sharp vs rhetorical delta.",
    "R1.7": "The agent flags one missing citation (e.g., PCMDI metrics) but does not audit every load-bearing citation or flag missing key works with bibliographic precision.",
    "RX.1": "The agent marks confidence and uncertainty for some claims, but not all recommendations.",
    "RX.3": "The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).",
    "RX.4": "No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original (e.g., overclaiming novelty).",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, but some minor prose issues remain."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.4": 0.8,
    "R1.7": 0.6,
    "RX.1": 0.9,
    "RX.3": 1.0,
    "RX.4": 1.0,
    "RX.5": 0.9
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.4: The agent identifies some prior work (e.g., ESMValTool, WeatherBench 2) but does not map against the nearest 3-5 works or identify sharp vs rhetorical delta.
rationale.R1.7: The agent flags one missing citation (e.g., PCMDI metrics) but does not audit every load-bearing citation or flag missing key works with bibliographic precision.
rationale.RX.1: The agent marks confidence and uncertainty for some claims, but not all recommendations.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original (e.g., overclaiming novelty).
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, but some minor prose issues remain.
